body:
## Summary
- Forward OPENAI_BASE_URL and OPENAI_MODEL into the implement provider resolver
- Forward the same relay settings into run-agent-task so Codex implement runs use TokenFlux instead of default api.openai.com

## Verification
- npm --prefix .agent ci
- npm --prefix .agent test: 673/673 pass

Unblocks live smoke issue #10.
title: Pass relay config to implement workflow
